Module com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6
Package com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller

Class SudokuController.ManejadorTeclado

java.lang.Object
com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController.ManejadorTeclado
All Implemented Interfaces:
EventListener, javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.scene.input.KeyEvent>
Enclosing class:
SudokuController
private class SudokuController.ManejadorTeclado extends Object implements javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.scene.input.KeyEvent>
Inner class that handles key released events on a specific cell.

Implemented as an inner class so it can directly access the enclosing controller's state (the model, the maps and the status label) without explicit references. Each instance is bound to a specific (row, column) coordinate, simplifying the handler logic.

    • handle

      public void handle(javafx.scene.input.KeyEvent evento)
      Processes a key release by syncing the field's text with the underlying model cell.

      handle in interface javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.scene.input.KeyEvent>
      Parameters:
      evento - the key event being processed
